title: Luffy Sets Sail with Shanks’ Promise
description: On pages 60–60, this part follows the Romance Dawn flashback and focuses on how Luffy’s pirate dream is formed through Shanks, Higuma, and the straw hat promise.
scene: Shanks leaves Luffy with the straw hat, turning their farewell into a promise about the future.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HARD TO BELIEVE THAT I'M GETTING SUCKED INTO THIS GIANT WHIRL- POOL...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: MAYBE I WAS A LITTLE CARELESS...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: could use some help, but there's nobody around.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: OH WELL, CAN'T BE HELPED. DOWN I GO...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Too bad I can't swim, too.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: HA! WHAT WAS THE THINKING? IN A GIANT WHIRLPOOL, IT DOESN'T REALLY MAKE A DIFFERENCE IF YOU CAN SWIM OR NOT!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'd drown Bibi I could swim!

summary: Shanks entrusts Luffy with the straw hat as a promise for the future. This moment turns Luffy’s dream into the core vow that will define his journey.
